name: Knack V2
description: OpenClaw tools for Fireflies transcript retrieval and Proof document creation

FIREFLIES_API_KEY.description: Fireflies API key used to fetch transcript data

PROOF_BASE_URL.description: Base URL for the Proof deployment

PROOF_PUBLIC_URL.description: Public browser-facing URL for the Proof editor

PROOF_OWNER_SECRET_STORE_PATH.description: Local JSON file used to persist Proof owner secrets

PROOF_TRACKED_DOCS_PATH.description: Local JSON file used to persist tracked Proof docs for review polling

KNACK_REVIEW_WATCH_DAYS.description: How many days a new Proof doc should be watched for comments

KNACK_AGENT_ID.description: Agent identity header used when calling Proof agent endpoints
